prepared_text:
eClerx/SECD/SE/2024/152 
 
October 29, 2024 
 
BSE Limited
Corporate Relationship Department,  
Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, 
25th Floor, Dalal Street,  
Fort, Mumbai - 400 001 
National Stock Exchange of India Limited
Exchange Plaza, Plot No. C/1, 
Block G, Bandra - Kurla Complex 
Bandra (East),  
Mumbai – 400 051 
 
Dear Sir/Madam, 
 
 
Reg: 
Intimation under Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) 
Regulations, 2015 [“Listing Regulations”] 
 
Sub: 
Intimation of the Q2FY25 Board Meeting and earnings call 
 
Scrip Code:  
BSE - 532927 
 
 
NSE – ECLERX 
 
This is to inform you that a Meeting of Board of Directors of the Company will be held on Tuesday, 
November 5, 2024, inter-alia, to approve and take on record the Un-audited Financial Results 
(Consolidated and Standalone) of the Company for the quarter and half year ended September 30, 
2024.  
 
As informed vide our letter number eClerx/SECD/SE/2024/143 dated September 26, 2024, the trading 
window for dealing in securities of the Company was closed from October 1, 2024 and the same shall 
remain closed till 48 hours after the announcement of the outcome of the board meeting and 
dissemination of the financial results on November 5, 2024. 
 
Further, the earnings call for the Un-audited Financial Results for the quarter and half year ended 
September 30, 2024 will be held on November 6, 2024 and the earnings call details as attached 
herewith, will also be available on the Company’s website www.eclerx.com. 
 
This is for your information and records. 
 
Thanking you, 
 
Yours faithfully 
For eClerx Services Limited 
 
 
 
 
 
Pratik Bhanushali 
VP – Legal & Company Secretary  
F8538 
 
Encl: As above 
PRATIK 
RAMESHBHAI 
BHANUSHALI
Digitally signed 
by PRATIK 
RAMESHBHAI 
BHANUSHALI 
Date: 2024.10.29 
21:14:02 +05'30'

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
eClerx Services Ltd. to announce Q2 FY25 results on November 5th, 2024;  
Earnings Call to be held on November 6th, 2024 at 5:00 PM (IST)  
 
Mumbai, October 29th, 2024: eClerx Services Ltd. (eCx), (BSE: 532927), (NSE: ECLERX), an 
industry-focused specialist services firm managing and improving complex data-driven 
processes, will announce its second quarter and half year of FY25 results on Tuesday, 
November 5th, 2024. The earnings call for the results would be held on Wednesday, 
November 6th, 2024 at 5:00 PM (IST). The earnings call details will also be available on the 
company’s website, www.eclerx.com   
 
The Details of Earnings Conference Call are: 
 
Date: November 6th, 2024 
 
Time (IST): 5:00 PM – 6:00 PM 
 
Click Here to Register Zoom Webinar 
After registering, you will receive a confirmation email containing information about joining 
the webinar. 
 
Management Representation from eClerx Services Ltd. 
 
Mr. Kapil Jain, Managing Director and Group Chief Executive Officer 
Mr. Srinivasan Nadadhur, Chief Financial Officer 
 
Participants are requested to log in 10 minutes prior to the start of scheduled call.  
 
About eClerx Services Ltd: 
 
eClerx provides business process management, automation and analytics services to a 
number of Fortune 2000 enterprises, including some of the world's leading financial services, 
communications, retail, fashion, media & entertainment, manufacturing, travel & leisure and 
technology companies. Incorporated in 2000, eClerx is today traded on both the Bombay and 
National Stock Exchanges of India. The firm employs 17,500+ people across Australia, Canada, 
Dubai, Germany, India, Italy, Netherlands, Paris, Philippines, Singapore, Thailand, UK and the 
USA. For more information, visit www.eclerx.com. 
 
For further information, please contact: 
 
Pratik Bhanushali 
eClerx Services 
Email: Pratik.Bhanushali@eclerx.com    
Asha Gupta 
Ernst & Young LLP  
Email: asha.gupta@in.ey.com  
 
eClerx Services Limited  
Q2 FY25 Earnings Call Invite
